phonetic: 藢瑟mj蕣n蓹蕣藞胃er蓹p瑟; 瑟藢mju藧n蓹蕣-
examples: For the time being, however, immunotherapy is still in its experimental stages.
Immunotherapy tries to help the immune system recognize cancer as a threat, and attack it.
Treatment, though - whether it's chemotherapy or immunotherapy - will tilt the odds in her favour.
Adam started immunotherapy treatment in August and has now completed four out of the five cycles.
The only way to fight allergies at the source is immunotherapy, popularly known as allergy shots.
